title: Crystal Ball Seasons
description: A three-image series that keeps one crystal ball, brass claw stand, and dark oracle table consistent while the miniature world inside changes across seasons.
creative_direction: Series package focused on object continuity and refractive storytelling: same crystal ball and tabletop setup, different seasonal narrative worlds inside the sphere.

en.title: Crystal Ball Seasons
en.description: A three-image series that keeps one crystal ball, brass claw stand, and dark oracle table consistent while the miniature world inside changes across seasons.

zh-CN.title: 水晶球四季叙事
zh-CN.description: 三张图保持同一颗水晶球、黄铜爪形底座和深色占卜桌不变，只改变球内的季节微缩世界。

generation_plan.ref_strategy: Run images by generation.order. For each dependency, wait until required_status=done, take the dependency result URL from the private run log, inject it into generation.ref_urls, then pass each URL as --ref. Local image_path is for dependency checks only because image2gen --ref requires URLs.
generation_plan.index_policy: Only meta.status=done images with an existing image.png are included in works/index.json and the frontend.
